'''nahono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:qiddush|qiddush]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:qiddush|qiddush]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nahono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næheneth|næheneth]] || [[word:næhenej|næhenej]] || [[word:næhenesh|næhenesh]] || [[word:næhene|næhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nahohonoth|nahohonoth]] || [[word:nahohonoj|nahohonoj]] || [[word:nahohonosh|nahohonosh]] || [[word:nahohono|nahohono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nahonoth|nahonoth]] || [[word:nahonoj|nahonoj]] || [[word:nahonosh|nahonosh]] || [[word:nahono|nahono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nahofnoth|nahofnoth]] || [[word:nahofnoj|nahofnoj]] || [[word:nahofnosh|nahofnosh]] || [[word:nahofnof|nahofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nahonotho|nahonotho]] || [[word:nahonojo|nahonojo]] || [[word:nahonosho|nahonosho]] || [[word:nahonoko|nahonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nahonoth|nahonoth]] || [[word:nahonoj|nahonoj]] || [[word:nahonosh|nahonosh]] || [[word:nahono|nahono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nahonothol|nahonothol]] || [[word:nahonojol|nahonojol]] || [[word:nahonoshol|nahonoshol]] || [[word:nahonokol|nahonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nahonothotho|nahonothotho]] || [[word:nahonojojo|nahonojojo]] || [[word:nahonoshosho|nahonoshosho]] || [[word:nahonoko|nahonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nahonothon|nahonothon]] || [[word:nahonojon|nahonojon]] || [[word:nahonoshon|nahonoshon]] || [[word:nahonokon|nahonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nahonothoro|nahonothoro]] || [[word:nahonojoro|nahonojoro]] || [[word:nahonoshoro|nahonoshoro]] || [[word:nahonokoro|nahonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
